headline20: Critical operational constraints are flagged at 27 airports right now.
management45: Critical operational constraints are flagged at 27 airports right now. Engine anti-ice operations are flagged at Gdańsk Lech Wałęsa (GDN/EPGD), Craiova (CRA/LRCV). Across base airports: 6 critical, 19 high, 6 medium, 8 normal. Key bases needing attention include London Luton (LTN/EGGW), Copernicus Wrocław (WRO/EPWR) and Chişinău (RMO/LUKK); plus 22 other bases. 6 additional base airports are at medium severity and should be monitored closely. At base airports, the dominant pattern is snow-related runway contamination risk, mist and low cloud base  — most notably around Gdańsk Lech Wałęsa (GDN/EPGD), Craiova (CRA/LRCV) and Venice Marco Polo (VCE/LIPZ). Network hotspots: Gdańsk Lech Wałęsa (GDN/EPGD), Craiova (CRA/LRCV), Marrakesh Menara (RAK/GMMX), Treviso Antonio Canova (TSF/LIPH), Venice Marco Polo (VCE/LIPZ) and 22 others. Primary drivers: low cloud base, very low visibility and fog / freezing fog. Expected impact is reduced runway capacity with higher delay and diversion risk, especially where visibility/RVR and cloud base are very low. Since the last update, 12 airports changed status, led by Gdańsk Lech Wałęsa (GDN/EPGD), Craiova (CRA/LRCV), Venice Marco Polo (VCE/LIPZ) and 9 others.
detail90: Critical operational constraints are flagged at 27 airports right now. Base airports (focus): London Luton (LTN/EGGW) — HIGH: fog; visibility down to 300 m, cloud base around 0 ft | Copernicus Wrocław (WRO/EPWR) — HIGH: mist; cloud base around 500 ft | Chişinău (RMO/LUKK) — HIGH: mist; visibility down to 1.5 km, cloud base around 300 ft | Iaşi (IAS/LRIA) — CRIT: freezing fog; cold-temperature performance penalties; visibility down to 300 m, RVR down to 600 m, cloud base around 100 ft | Tirana International Airport Mother Teresa (TIA/LATI) — HIGH: thunderstorm / convective risk | Bucharest Henri Coandă (OTP/LROP) — HIGH: freezing fog; cold-temperature performance penalties; visibility down to 600 m, cloud base around 200 ft and 19 others. Worst affected now: Gdańsk Lech Wałęsa (GDN/EPGD) — CRIT: freezing fog; snow; freezing precipitation / icing risk (drivers: engine anti-ice operations, low-visibility procedures (reduced capacity), runway visual range (RVR) constraints) | Craiova (CRA/LRCV) — CRIT: freezing fog; freezing precipitation / icing risk; cold-temperature performance penalties (drivers: engine anti-ice operations, low-visibility procedures (reduced capacity), runway visual range (RVR) constraints) | Marrakesh Menara (RAK/GMMX) — CRIT: fog; visibility down to 100 m, cloud base around 200 ft; below approach minima (current METAR) (drivers: low-visibility procedures (reduced capacity), runway visual range (RVR) constraints, approach minima limits) | Treviso Antonio Canova (TSF/LIPH) — CRIT: fog; visibility down to 50 m, RVR down to 325 m, cloud base around 200 ft; below approach minima (current METAR) (drivers: low-visibility procedures (reduced capacity), low-visibility takeoff restrictions, runway visual range (RVR) constraints) | Venice Marco Polo (VCE/LIPZ) — CRIT: fog; visibility down to 100 m, RVR down to 750 m, cloud base around 100 ft; below alternate minima (current METAR) (drivers: low-visibility takeoff restrictions, runway visual range (RVR) constraints, approach minima limits) | Copenhagen Kastrup (CPH/EKCH) — CRIT: snow; cold-temperature performance penalties; visibility down to 1.2 km, cloud base around 500 ft (drivers: cold-temperature performance penalties, snow/blowing snow) and 21 others. Changed since last run: Gdańsk Lech Wałęsa (GDN/EPGD), Craiova (CRA/LRCV), Venice Marco Polo (VCE/LIPZ), Copenhagen Kastrup (CPH/EKCH), Malmö Sturup (MMX/ESMS), Seve Ballesteros-Santander (SDR/LEXJ), Bordeaux–Mérignac (BOD/LFBD), Berlin Brandenburg Willy Brandt (BER/EDDB), Stockholm-Arlanda (ARN/ESSA), Kaunas (KUN/EYKA) and 2 others.
